heading: Education allowance
label: 4088 Education allowance
text: A Department or United States Agency for International Development employee who is on leave to perform service in the uniformed services (as defined in ) may receive an education allowance if the employee would, if not for such service, be eligible to receive the education allowance.section 4303(13) of title 38
notes: Amendments2024— inserted “or United States Agency for International Development” after “A Department”.Pub. L. 118–159
amendments: Amendments2024— inserted “or United States Agency for International Development” after “A Department”.Pub. L. 118–159
